pi_items.source: Task description: 'Datum 50° 35.00' N, 001° 20.00' W' (West is negative)
IAMSAR manual and verified against leg_sequence_nm array length
IAMSAR Expanding Square Search pattern with d=0.5nm: legs 1-2 are d, legs 3-4 are 2d, legs 5-6 are 3d, legs 7-8 are 4d
IAMSAR Expanding Square requires 90-degree course alterations at each waypoint, starting from North (0°)
Bridge Command standard directory structure for scenarios at /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/[scenario-name]

privileged_info_summary: This task involves creating an IAMSAR Search and Rescue training scenario in the Bridge Command simulator. The datum position is 50°35.00'N, 001°20.00'W, which converts to decimal coordinates 50.5833°, -1.3333°, located in the Solent area near Southampton, England. The task requires configuring an 8-leg Expanding Square Search pattern following IAMSAR standards with distances [0.5, 0.5, 1.0, 1.0, 1.5, 1.5, 2.0, 2.0] nautical miles and bearings [0°, 90°, 180°, 270°, 0°, 90°, 180°, 270°] (90-degree alterations). The scenario directory structure and configuration files (environment.ini, ownship.ini, othership.ini) follow Bridge Command's standard format and directory conventions.
